description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy across multiple Linux images, including Amazon Linux, Arch Linux, AlmaLinux, Rocky Linux, Debian, Fedora, and Ubuntu, with a GNU compiler in Release build type. For each job, install Git, check out the code, install dependencies, build and install ckb-next, run ckb-next-daemon --help, package ckb-next, and upload the package as a workflow artifact.
